footer.note: Aviawings is a flight metasearch platform. Bookings and payments are completed on our partners' sites; we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.

home.heroSubtitle: From Baku to Istanbul and everywhere beyond. Compare the best-priced flights in seconds.
home.popularRoutesSub: The most loved flights, one tap away
home.inspirationSub: Hand-picked destinations — complete with weather, events and travel guides
home.plannerBannerText: Let our AI-powered travel planner design a route just for you: history, culture, food and fun — all tuned to your taste.
home.why1Text: No hidden fees. The price you see is the price you pay.
home.why2Text: Weather, events and travel tips — bundled with your ticket.
home.why3Text: Your data is protected with bank-grade encryption.
home.why4Text: We're with you at every step of your journey.
home.soonHotelsText: Hand-picked stays, matched to your flight.
home.soonEsimText: Stay connected the moment you land — no plastic SIM needed.

errors.sameAirport: Origin and destination can't be the same

results.title: Flight results
results.resultsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No flights found} =1 {1 flight found} other {# flights found}}
results.noResults: No flights found for this date
results.noResultsSub: Try a different date or a nearby airport.
results.demoNotice: Prices are indicative — the final price is shown on the partner site where you complete your booking.

booking.title: Booking
booking.contactText: Tickets and flight notifications will be sent here.
booking.extrasSoon: Extras will be available with live ticketing
booking.demoPaymentText: Live ticketing isn't active yet. This is a preview flow — don't enter card details; nothing will be processed or charged.
booking.confirmedText: Your booking reference is {code}. Details have been sent to your email (demo).
booking.confirmedDemo: This is a demo booking — no real ticket has been issued.

errors.expired: Your session expired. Please search again.

destinations.title: Explore destinations
destinations.subtitle: Weather, events and places to see — know everything before you book.

weather.title: Weather
weather.note: Forecasts come from Open-Meteo; for dates beyond 16 days we show seasonal averages.

events.title: Events & seasons
events.subtitle: Don't miss these while you're there

destinations.planWithAi: Create an AI plan for this city

planner.title: AI Travel Planner
planner.subtitle: Answer a few questions and we'll design a journey just for you.

quiz.destination: Where would you like to explore?
quiz.style: What kind of trip do you dream of?
quiz.paceRelaxedText: 1–2 stops a day, plenty of ease
quiz.paceBalancedText: See the sights, keep some downtime
quiz.days: How many days should we plan?

planner.generatingSub: Blending history, culture and flavor stops just for you
planner.askAnything: Ask anything about your plan — history, culture, tips…
planner.chatPlaceholder: E.g. Tell me briefly about this city's history
planner.notConfiguredText: This feature is being prepared and will be here very soon.
planner.disclaimer: AI suggestions are for inspiration; opening hours and details may change.
planner.quizDestination: Where would you like to explore?
planner.destinationPlaceholder: Type a country or city — e.g. Rome, Japan, Bali…
planner.quizWhen: When are you planning to go?
planner.openDayRoute: Open the day's route on the map
planner.exportNote: For PDF, choose "Save as PDF" in the window that opens.
planner.preparedBy: Prepared by the Aviawings AI Travel Planner

auth.signInSubtitle: Your favorites, bookings and price alerts are waiting.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Join free — get price alerts and faster booking.
auth.resetText: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetSent: Reset link sent. Check your inbox.
auth.checkEmail: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.notConfigured: Membership will be available very soon.

errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

account.title: My account
account.noTripsSub: Your bookings will appear here once you book your first flight.
account.noFavoritesSub: Save routes and destinations you love with the heart icon.
account.noAlertsSub: Set an alert for a route and be the first to know when prices drop.

consent.title: Cookie preferences
consent.text: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze traffic and show you relevant offers. You can change your preferences at any time.
consent.necessaryText: Required for the site to function; can't be turned off.
consent.analyticsText: Help us understand how you use the site, anonymously (Google Analytics).
consent.marketingText: Enable relevant offers and ads (Google Ads, Meta).

notFound.title: Route not found
notFound.text: The page you're looking for may have moved or never existed. Best to set off on a nice journey instead.

errorPage.title: We hit some turbulence
errorPage.text: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

home.title: Aviawings — Flights & Smart Travel
home.description: The best-priced flights to Baku, Istanbul and beyond. Plan your trip with weather, events and an AI travel planner.

flights.title: Search Flights — Aviawings
flights.description: Compare hundreds of flights and find the best fare in seconds.

destinations.title: Destinations — Aviawings
destinations.description: Get to know your destination: weather, events, places to visit and practical tips.

planner.title: AI Travel Planner — Aviawings
planner.description: Create a personal travel itinerary tuned to your taste with our AI-powered planner.

visa.title: Visa Check — Aviawings
visa.description: Which countries need a visa for your passport? Check instantly: visa-free, e-visa, visa on arrival.

visa.title: Visa Check
visa.subtitle: Pick your passport and destination — instantly see whether you need a visa.

status.visa_free_days: No visa required · up to {days} days
status.self: Your own country — no visa needed

desc.visa_free: You can travel visa-free with this passport. Make sure it stays valid for at least 6 months beyond your return date.
desc.e_visa: Apply for an e-visa online before you travel. Applications are usually processed within a few business days.
desc.visa_on_arrival: You can obtain your visa at the border on arrival. Bring photos and cash for the fee.
desc.eta: Obtain an electronic travel authorization online before travelling; it usually takes minutes.
desc.visa_required: You need to obtain a visa from a consulate or embassy before travelling. Apply early.
desc.no_admission: This route appears to have entry restrictions; consult official authorities for details.
desc.self: No visa is needed to travel to your own country.

visa.disclaimer: This information comes from open data and can change; always verify with official sources before you travel.
visa.mapTitle: Where your {country} passport can take you

groups.visa_required: {count} countries require a visa in advance

discover.title: Spin the globe, find your muse
discover.subtitle: Little-known corners that enchant everyone who finds them — every spin lands on a new discovery.
discover.aiThinking: Avia is telling you about this place…
discover.planTrip: Create an AI plan for this place
